problem: Can ocean acidification be safely reversed — what biochemical approach?
mechanism: Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling
hypothesis: If Mycorrhizal network enhancement for nutrient cycling is applied to what, then function improves will occur because the mechanism targets the root cause directly.

experiment.protocol: Mesocosm controlled study with 2 month follow-up. Control group receives placebo/sham.

wisdom: Nature uses only the longest threads to weave her patterns. — Richard Feynman
